title: Errors — severity distribution
prompt: Break down our 24h log volume by severity level. Show me the percentages — what fraction is INFO vs WARN vs ERROR vs CRITICAL etc. If some volume has no severity tag, call that out specifically.
persona: Senior SRE writing a logging-quality report. The user knows untagged severity is a label-quality issue worth flagging separately.

expected_answer.summary: 83% of demo-env volume is UNTAGGED (no severity_level label). ERROR is the second-largest tier at ~8.6% / 464MB. CRITICAL is rare (~2MB).
